detectors.description:
LaneVault4626.setSettlementAdapter(address).newAdapter (src/LaneVault4626.sol#256) lacks a zero-check on :
		- settlementAdapter = newAdapter (src/LaneVault4626.sol#262)
LaneVault4626.processRedeemQueue(uint256) (src/LaneVault4626.sol#335-362) has external calls inside a loop: (exists,request) = queueManager.peek() (src/LaneVault4626.sol#345)

detectors.description: LaneVault4626.processRedeemQueue(uint256) (src/LaneVault4626.sol#335-362) has external calls inside a loop: dequeued = queueManager.dequeue() (src/LaneVault4626.sol#351)
detectors.markdown: [LaneVault4626.processRedeemQueue(uint256)](src/LaneVault4626.sol#L335-L362) has external calls inside a loop: [dequeued = queueManager.dequeue()](src/LaneVault4626.sol#L351)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in LaneSettlementAdapter._ccipReceive(Client.Any2EVMMessage) (src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#72-97):
	External calls:
	- vault.reconcileSettlementSuccess(payload.fillId,payload.principalAssets,payload.netFeeIncomeAssets) (src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#90)
	- vault.reconcileSettlementLoss(payload.fillId,payload.principalAssets,payload.recoveredAssets) (src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#93)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- SettlementProcessed(message.messageId,replayKey,payload.fillId,payload.success,payload.principalAssets) (src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#96)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [LaneSettlementAdapter._ccipReceive(Client.Any2EVMMessage)](src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#L72-L97):
	External calls:
	- [vault.reconcileSettlementSuccess(payload.fillId,payload.principalAssets,payload.netFeeIncomeAssets)](src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#L90)
	- [vault.reconcileSettlementLoss(payload.fillId,payload.principalAssets,payload.recoveredAssets)](src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#L93)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [SettlementProcessed(message.messageId,replayKey,payload.fillId,payload.success,payload.principalAssets)](src/LaneSettlementAdapter.sol#L96)
